ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Total population count in the region */,
  "population_growth" REAL /* Annual population growth rate */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region for better identification */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region for geographical context */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region for geographical context */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density (population per square kilometer) */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON string representing age distribution in the region */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* JSON string representing gender distribution in the region */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* JSON string representing ethnicity distribution in the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the demographic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_data" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "mean_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature recorded */,
  "total_heat" REAL /* Total heat accumulation */,
  "temperature_variance" REAL /* Variability in temperature */,
  "temperature_standard_error" REAL /* Standard error of the mean temperature */,
  "temperature_coefficient_of_variation" REAL /* Coefficient of variation for temperature */,
  "temperature_range" TEXT /* Range of temperatures (e.g., 10-20°C) */,
  "temperature_skewness" REAL /* Skewness of the temperature distribution */,
  "temperature_kurtosis" REAL /* Kurtosis of the temperature distribution */,
  "extreme_weather_events" TEXT /* JSON string representing the frequency and type of extreme weather events */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the temperature data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "research_field" TEXT /* Research field or specialization */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role in the institution */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login to the platform */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region associated with the dataset */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher responsible for the dataset */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the data collected */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., satellite, ground sensors) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES demographics ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset analyzed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., trend analysis, predictive modeling) */,
  "result_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis results */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was conducted */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis (e.g., regression, time series) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis results */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analysis the visualization is based on */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, map) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization */,
  "visualization_tool" TEXT /* Tool used to create the visualization (e.g., Matplotlib, Tableau) */,
  "visualization_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the visualization (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset involved in the collaboration */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher leading the collaboration */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator researcher */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., data sharing, joint analysis) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security log entry */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher involved in the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of security event (e.g., data access, data modification) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the security event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the security event occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from where the event occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from the request */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., success, failed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
